reviews.comment: Excellent experience! Brian Ennis gives very clear directions and instructions for first aid and CPR. He's very down to earth and doesn't mind repeating himself. He has great stories, encourages questions, and has the best hands-on training.

reviewReply.comment: Thank you, Graham, for the wonderful review! I'm glad you enjoyed the training and found the instructions clear and helpful. It was great to have you in the class. Thanks again for choosing 910CPR, and I hope to see you back when it's time for a refresher!

reviews.name: accounts/113447197806150947083/locations/8102268822080792056/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURuNklYdm1nRRAB

reviewReply.comment: Thank you so much for the 5 stars! We're thrilled to know you had a great experience with us!

reviews.comment: 910CPR is the best for all life support certifications!! Whether getting an initial certification or needing a quick renewal. They are very responsive making it easy to communicate with and answer any questions you may have prior to a course. They also provide same day eCards!! I would recommend 910CPR to anyone and everyone! Thanks again, Brian!!

reviewReply.comment: Thank you, Anna! We're thrilled you had such a positive experience with us. Our goal is to make the certification process smooth and efficient, and it’s great to hear that our efforts are paying off. Whether it's a first-time certification or a quick renewal, we’re here to help you every step of the way. If anyone else is looking for easy scheduling and same-day eCards, we’ve got them covered too! Thanks for the shout-out, and we look forward to seeing you in a future class.

If anyone else is looking for a class that’s both informative and fun, check us out—they can even request Nick if they'd like!
